fields.label: Your public domain name
fields.description:
The address users type in the browser (e.g. boards.example.com).

DNS must already point to this server.

fields.label: Atlantisboard server address
fields.description: Where the app runs on this machine. Use 127.0.0.1 when the app is on this server.

fields.label: Atlantisboard port
fields.description: Must match the application port you chose earlier.

fields.label: Maximum upload size (MB)
fields.description: Large file upload limit at the web server. Match your card attachment size limit.

fields.label: Let's Encrypt notification email
fields.description: Optional. Certificate expiry notices from Let's Encrypt.

fields.label: SSL certificate file
fields.description:
Path to fullchain.pem (Let's Encrypt or your CA).

Leave default if you plan to run certbot next.

fields.label: DH parameters file
fields.description: Optional on modern TLS. certbot ssl-dhparams.pem path.

fields.label: Access log file path
fields.description: Caddy writes access logs here. Parent directory must exist.
